content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.66%, Bank Nifty -1.12%, India VIX +3.19% to 17.15 — broad market weak but rotation strong into IT, defence, FMCG, capital goods, pharma. Book is up +1.33% on the day with multiple winners (PNBHOUSING +10.5%, COFORGE +8.5%, CAMS +4.2%). Priority is locking in gains via trailing SLs on the strong winners while letting fresh CNC entries (PIDILITIND, BHARATFORG, BAJAJ-AUTO etc.) work to their original targets.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1072.12,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD effectively — current SL 1072.12 is already a +9% lock-in (well above breakeven). CMP 1090.60 is only ~1.7% above SL, so any further trail would breach the 1% trail-gap rule (Rule trailing SL discipline). Leave SL and target unchanged. No-op MODIFY avoided — converting to HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong winner +10.5%. SL 1072.12 already locks ~9% gain. CMP 1090.60 only 1.7% above SL — tightening further would breach 1% trail-gap rule and force a self-induced exit. Let it run to 1135 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Hedge position -0.7%. SL 121.00 (~2.6% below CMP) is appropriate for a hedge that's meant to cushion equity drawdown. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 818.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO at all-time-high 836.50 intraday, CMP 828.50 (+2.64%), volume 2.7x. Current SL 818 already at breakeven (entry 820). Original target 845 too tight given fresh ATH breakout — extending target to 855 (R:R from current = ~2.5:1 vs SL). SL stays at 818 (1.3% below CMP, just inside 1% trail-gap on a low-vol FMCG name; acceptable). Q4 PAT +14% YoY, +22% revenue, dividend Rs 4 announced."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1338.68,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strongest winner +8.5%, CMP 1362.60. Current SL 1338.68 is ~1.75% below CMP — within 1% trail-gap floor +0.75% buffer. Q4 PAT 612 Cr beat (with one-time tax aid caveat), USD 1.75B order book, Encora close. Let it run to 1420. No further trail — would breach 1% gap rule. Converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.5% winner. SL 1338.68 already locks +6.3% gain, sits 1.75% below CMP (within trail-gap discipline). Tightening further would risk same-day forced exit. Let to 1420 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GRSE +5.17% to 3067, defence Q4 strong (PAT +24%, EBITDA margin 16.77%). Current SL 3030 = breakeven+ (entry 3025). CMP 3067, SL 3030 = ~1.2% below CMP — at the trail-gap floor. Holding levels unchanged; converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 3030 at breakeven, 1.2% below CMP — at trail-gap floor. Hold to 3225 target."
    },
    {

      "product": "CNC",

      "new_target": 875.00,

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CAMS +5.31% to 839.75 on 7.4x vol. SL 825 already breakeven+19 (entry 806), 1.8% below CMP. Q4 PAT +11.2%, all-time-high EBITDA margin 46.5%. Hold structure unchanged — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.2% winner. SL 825 already +2.4% above entry, 1.8% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. Hold to 875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Just entered, -0.1%. Q4 beat: PAT +37%, margin +280bps. SL 1445 (3% below CMP) intact. Let thesis play to 1575 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6%, intraday wobble within SL absorption. Q4 turnaround real (PAT 166 Cr vs loss YoY); 11.8x volume signal still constructive. SL 1580 (1.8% below CMP) holds. Don't pre-empt SL on intraday noise (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, just entered. Q4 PAT +11%, FY26 +47%, 9% gap-up day before. SL 2745 (1.4% below CMP) intact. Hold to 2920."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2% just entered at fresh ATH after Q4 (revenue +27%, dividend Rs 47/share record). SL 9020 (1% below CMP) at trail-gap floor. Hold to 9550."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, intraday wobble. Q4 mixed (revenue +18%, PAT -17% on exceptionals) but defence order book Rs 10,961 Cr structural. SL 1955 (3% below CMP) intact. Hold; do not pre-empt SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4%, just entered. Q4 PAT +30.6%, AUM Rs 5.91tn, lending +32%. SL 354 (2.5% below CMP) intact. Hold to 384."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6%, intraday consolidation after +6.64% move. Q4 PAT +34%, buyback at Rs 12,000/share (~12% premium) is the major catalyst still pending record date. SL 10440 (2.4% below CMP) intact. Hold to 11260."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "reasoning": "GOVERNANCE OVERHANG — Rule 13 hard reject. Active SFIO probe (Rs 2,600 Cr derivatives), SEBI + NFRA concurrent investigations, Rs 1,979 Cr accounting lapse, Rs 173 Cr microfinance fraud — all unresolved. Bank only DENIED formal SFIO summons (not the probe itself). Q4 PAT recovery is real but does NOT neutralize unresolved criminal/regulator action. Stock near 52w high adds profit-booking risk. Past failure mode (Day-5 INDUSINDBK round-trip) explicitly cited. Default disposition: NO entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RAMCOCEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "reasoning": "BEARISH research (-0.07 modifier). Q4 results PENDING — binary event within 3 sessions, Rule 11 reject for new entry. South India pricing at 4-year lows, oversupply overhang, stock 24.7% below 52w high (laggard in recovering sector). No edge."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [

    {

      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Slight intraday red but Q4 turnaround intact. SL 1580 (1.8% below CMP) holds; do not pre-empt."
    },

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },

      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

  "watchlist_notes": "BAJAJ-AUTO already entered earlier — re-entry-cooldown cleared via fresh buyback catalyst. POLYCAB / FINCABLES / THERMAX cluster: holding only POLYCAB; FINCABLES + THERMAX are correlated cluster expansion that I'm declining today (Rule 10). LAURUSLABS / LUPIN: WOCKPHARMA already covers pharma exposure; no additional pharma cluster admit. NUVAMA +20% top gainer: spike-driven, no clear catalyst confirmed — pass. TATATECH 12.8x volume: no fundamental catalyst surfaced, pass. PERSISTENT / DABUR / GABRIEL / APOLLOTYRE: qualifying but cluster-saturated (already hold COFORGE, MARICO, BHARATFORG respectively). HFCL OPEN BUY @ 133.50 from 56h ago (3388m) — STALE ORDER. Will cancel separately or let expire; thesis no longer fresh.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 61% (~₹619K of ₹808K cap), cash ₹390K — comfortable cushion. 13 holdings across BFSI (PNBHOUSING, CAMS, ABCAPITAL), IT (COFORGE), Defence/CapGoods (GRSE, POLYCAB, BHARATFORG), FMCG (MARICO, PIDILITIND), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA), Chem (SRF), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO), Hedge (GOLDBEES). Today's session: 6 of 13 names are winners (4 of those 4-10%). Strategy is to LET WINNERS RUN to original targets — not preemptive trimming. Trail-gap discipline (Rule trailing SL) keeps me from forced exits on the +5%+ winners (PNBHOUSING, COFORGE, CAMS, GRSE, MARICO) — every one is currently at the 1.0-1.8% trail-gap floor, exactly the calibrated level. No new entries today: cluster caps, governance rejects (INDUSINDBK), or pre-Q4 binaries (RAMCOCEM) cleanly disqualify the remaining watchlist names. This is Rule 18 compliant — every BULLISH watchlist candidate has explicit per-name reject rationale (cluster, cooldown, or governance). VIX +3% and macro choppy supports not stacking more longs."
}
